revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
revision.text:
<noinclude>
{{Draft categories|
[[Category:templates with draft categories]]
[[Category:Pages without meta categories]]
}}

<noinclude>{{Draft categories|
[[Category:Pages without meta categories]]
}}</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{template doc page viewed directly}}</noinclude> <!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE --> === Usage === This template can be used to mark articles or sections with old or out-of-date information.
This template will add articles to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles in need of updating]].
=== Alternatives === *If there is a dispute about the need for an update, an out-of-date article or section can be marked with {{tl|Out of date}}. *{{tl|Update after}} is an alternative for individual statements that will be out-of-date at a specifiable future date. It is a more recent and preferred alternative to [[Wikipedia:As of]]. It also adds articles to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles in need of updating]]. *See [[Wikipedia:Template messages]] for alternatives unrelated to out-of-date information. *For an in-text tag, {{tl|old fact}} should be used.
<includeonly> <!-- ADD CATEGORIES BELOW THIS LINE --> [[Category:Time and date maintenance templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Temporal templates]] [[Category:Templates needing talk links and other improvements]]
<!-- ADD INTERWIKIS BELOW THIS LINE --> [[cs:Template:Aktualizovat]] [[de:Vorlage:Veraltet]] [[pl:Szablon:Aktualizacja]] [[ru:Шаблон:Обновить]] [[sv:Mall:Uppdateras]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:Lỗi thời]] [[uk:Шаблон:Старі дані]] [[zh:Template:Update]] </includeonly>

revision.comment: /* Usage */ explain the usage of the 'type' parameter
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{template doc page viewed directly}}</noinclude> <!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE --> === Usage === This template can be used to mark articles or sections with old or out-of-date information. To mark a section use <nowiki>{{update|type=section}}</nowiki>.
This template will add articles to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles in need of updating]].
=== Alternatives === *If there is a dispute about the need for an update, an out-of-date article or section can be marked with {{[[Template:Out of date|Out of date]]}}. *{{[[Template:Update after|Update after]]}} is an alternative for individual statements that will be out-of-date at a specifiable future date. It is a more recent and preferred alternative to [[Wikipedia:As of]]. It also adds articles to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles in need of updating]]. *See [[Wikipedia:Template_messages/Cleanup#Time_sensitive]] for alternatives unrelated to out-of-date information. *For an in-text tag, {{[[Template:old fact|old fact]]}} should be substituted.
===See also=== *{{tl|recentism}} *{{tl|current}} *{{tl|time-context}}

<noinclude>{{template doc page viewed directly}}</noinclude> <!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE --> === Usage === This template can be used to mark articles or sections with old or out-of-date information. To mark a section use <nowiki>{{update|type=section}}</nowiki>.
This template will add articles to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles in need of updating]].
=== Alternatives === *If there is a dispute about the need for an update, an out-of-date article or section can be marked with {{[[Template:Out of date|Out of date]]}}. *{{[[Template:Update after|Update after]]}} is an alternative for individual statements that will be out-of-date at a specifiable future date. It is a more recent and preferred alternative to [[Wikipedia:As of]]. It also adds articles to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles in need of updating]]. *See [[Wikipedia:Template_messages/Cleanup#Time-sensitive]] for alternatives unrelated to out-of-date information. *For an in-text tag, {{[[Template:old fact|old fact]]}} should be substituted.

Smash Da Curse
Background Information Birth name: Simphiwe Mashexa Also known as: Smash, Smash Da Curse or Smash89 Born: July 14, 1989 (Age 21) Residing: East London, Eastern Cape, South Africa Origin: King William’s Town, Eastern Cape, South Africa Genres: R&B, Hip Hop, Pop Occupations: Student, Singer songwriter, Film Editor, Film Producer, Screen-writer, Actor, Author Associated acts: DJ Tala, Siphokazi Puky Cyphor Mbewu, Bakhona Qwane, Sakhele Mayoyo, Xola Mgodleni, Mthokozisi Xazela, Sonwabile Sepoko, Tembi Tichaawa, Sibongile Ngaka. Instruments: LG Power Producer, Pen and Paper Years Active: 2008- present Label: Mashexa Productions, WSU Website: www.myspace.com/smashdacurse Simphiwe Mashexa (born July 14, 1989) who is well known by his mononym Smash, which is a combination of his surname and name. He is a South African R&B, Hip Hop singer and Actor. He is best known for being a PALLfor Destinations I 2008. He has written a study notes for the subject with a help from his mentor and lecturer Tembi Tichaawa.
Early life: Smash was born in small location of King William's Town: Mxhalanga Location he grew up with his parents and his younger brother who is an upcoming producer of music Thanduxolo “DJ Tala” Mashexa in a loving family of Amacirha tribe. Smash gained in interest in music while he was 9 years he use to listen to O’ Jays and Michael Jackson and he wanted to become a singer and late 90’s he formed a group called: Nkasie Pjambas with Bonginkosi Zagana his long time friend as a child. He felt in with R&B and Hip Hop/ Rap in 1999 and then in 2003 he has to choose a career to pursue at tertiary level, he had three choices to choose from Geography, Tourism and Journalism because he was good in Geography and History. 2008 he was accepted to study for Tourism Management at Walter Sisulu University. Personal life: Smash is in a relationship with Siphokazi Puky Cyphor Mbewu, whom he started dating on March 10, 2009. The two seem as a perfect couple, they are good for each other. Music Career: His inspirations on music is Ne Yo he like his style of music and also Mario, Polow da Don and Timbaland. He began writing songs in 2008

<noinclude>{{template doc page viewed directly}}</noinclude> <!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE --> === Usage === This template can be used to mark articles or sections with old or out-of-date information. To mark a section use {{tlx|Update|type{{=}}section}}.
This template will add articles to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles in need of updating]].
===Example=== <nowiki>{{update|documentation}}</nowiki> {{update|documentation}}
=== Alternatives === * If there is a dispute about the need for an update, an out-of-date article or section can be marked with {{tl|Out of date}}. * {{tl|Update after}} is an alternative for individual statements that will be out-of-date at a specifiable future date. It is a more recent and preferred alternative to [[Wikipedia:As of]]. It also adds articles to [[:Category:Wikipedia articles in need of updating]]. * See [[Wikipedia:Template_messages/Cleanup#Time-sensitive]] for alternatives unrelated to out-of-date information.
=== See also === * {{tl|Recentism}} * {{tl|Current}} * {{tl|Time-context}} * {{tl|Updated}} * {{tl|As of}}

revision.comment: clean up documentation subpage templates using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]

revision.text: The Safest Future... We are an international safety association mainly operating through safety membership, and action centers globally. Here professionals can find safety training, online safety education, safety topics, safety e-learning solutions to the safest future. Forming groups of safety research consultants we set out safety strategies and also deliver better corporate safety solutions

revision.comment: "section=" parameter does not work; use ''{{update section}}'' instead
document unnamed parameters. move table to example section.

/* Usage */ "update" the documentation (to tell editors [when] to use "{{update section}}") - this is in accordance with the comment from SENATOR2029 dated "22 Feb 2012" found at [[Template_talk:Update#.22article.22_should_be_.22article_or_section.22.3F]]
un-redirect – this is making [[Template:Update]] display [[Template:Update section]]'s documentation, which currently reads "Don't use it"
Migrating 27 interwiki links, now provided by [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] on [[d:Q5617874]]
/* See also */ Restore relevant See also.
/* See also */ Merged categories from [[Template:Out of date]]
/*Example*/ Demo one of the examples from the Usage section ... which turns out not to work.

revision.text: Anand Badoniya is an Indian cinematographer, photographer,actor and film director known for his work in shortfilms. His first independent work was for dushyant kapoor in (2015) as a cinematographer and , which was considered as a technically path-breaking film in Indian Cinema. Later, he made his cinmetograpical debut with The Halt (2015). The film received a different response, as it was a different film and shi-fi from the cliched films. Anand Badoniya work is most noted for innovative use of lighting, subject specific visualization, use of natural colors on screen, Tele-focus shots, balancing the depth of focus between the subject and objects and many more techniques.

Lieutenant Commander
LETTER OF APPRECIATION
1. It has been brought to my notice that whilst holding the appointment of Staff Officer …………………………..at Naval Headquarters, you have played a major role in construction activities of Floating Market Shopping Complex at Pettah, under the guidance of Ministry of Defence and Urban Development. Similarly, you have executed the assigned duties admirably and extended your fullest support and cooperation to complete numerous projects successfully.

Lieutenant Commander
